new_information: Added a repository-specific meeting summary workflow that incorporates structured output requirements, completeness checks, action-item extraction, and transcript normalization rules.
impact_on_existing_information: This adds an explicit operating workflow for meeting summarization in Maxwell and clarifies that the external guidance must be adapted from 04_COLLABORATION to the repository's active 09_COLLABORATION and 08_DECISIONS structure. It also resolves an internal conflict in the source guidance by standardizing normalized transcript text as .txt.
